description: Create and deploy a NextGen Connect channel named 'Lab_Order_Sender' that sends HL7 ORM messages from a TCP Listener source on port 6661 to a TCP Sender destination at localhost:6699. Configure the channel to handle negative acknowledgments (NACKs) such that if the returned ACK code (MSA-1) is 'AE' or 'AR', the message status is set to ERROR and the error text from MSA-3 is appended to /home/ga/lab_rejections.log. A sample message is available at /home/ga/sample_orm.hl7. The web dashboard is accessible at https://localhost:8443 (admin/admin).
